name: magic-words
description: Magic Words — a fun bilingual word-learning game for kids in Claude Code

metadata.description: A kid-friendly bilingual word-mastery game. The Word Wizard turns a single word (English or Chinese) into a picture, a silly magic formula, a memory spell, an everyday example, and a tiny challenge — output as two parallel kid-native cards, one Chinese and one English, each with a fun chant. Accepts either-language input, surfaces the truest cross-language equivalent, and auto-scales tone for ages ~4–12. Inspired by lijigang's original 'Word Soul Master' (单词灵魂解剖师).

plugins.name: magic-words
plugins.description: Word Wizard skill for kids. Use /magic-words <word> to turn any word into a fun bilingual learning card.
